name: RefitTrimKnotMode
summary: The mode for adding kinots to the surface for fitting

enum_values.name: UniformEntireSurface
enum_values.summary: The entire surface is fit using uniform spacing with the specified number of knots

enum_values.name: UniformPerSpan
enum_values.summary: Each existing span is uniformly spaced with the specified number of knots

enum_values.name: Custom
enum_values.summary: The provided knot vector will be used
